summary: Taiki has pivoted from a profitable bearish shorting strategy to explicitly calling a market bottom and predicting higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After aggressively shorting Ethereum for much of late 2025, his March 2026 analysis signals a major trend change where he argues that the market bottom is in. He now dismisses bearish 4-year cycle theories and suggests new capital flows and leverage will propel BTC upward.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
